name: Infor SyteLine (CloudSuite Industrial) ERP API
what_it_does: Infor SyteLine (CloudSuite Industrial) REST APIs for manufacturing ERP targeting discrete and process manufacturing. Enables AI agents to manage production scheduling and job shop order management for manufacturing execution, handle engineer-to-order (ETO) and make-to-order (MTO) project tracking for custom manufacturing, access inventory management and warehouse operations data for manufacturing supply chain, retrieve quality management and inspection data for manufacturing quality control, handle customer order management and delivery scheduling for order fulfillment, access purchasing and supplier management workflow for procurement automation, retrieve cost accounting and job costing data for manufacturing financial analysis, manage material requirements planning (MRP) and demand planning data, handle shop floor control and labor reporting data for production tracking, and integrate manufacturing data with CAD, PLM, CRM, and IoT platforms.
use_cases: Automating production scheduling from manufacturing planning agents
Tracking job costs from ETO project management agents
Managing inventory from MRP supply chain agents
Processing customer orders from order management agents
not_for: Process manufacturing (continuous) without discrete/job shop manufacturing focus
Non-manufacturing businesses without production management needs
Simple inventory without full manufacturing ERP complexity
best_when: A discrete manufacturer, job shop, ETO manufacturer, or industrial equipment maker using Infor SyteLine/CloudSuite Industrial wants AI agents to automate production scheduling, job cost tracking, inventory management, customer order fulfillment, and manufacturing analytics.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: SyteLine manages regulated manufacturing data for aerospace, medical device, and defense customers — AS9100, ISO 13485, and ITAR-regulated processes require validated change control for ERP configuration changes. Automated job costing and revenue recognition must comply with percentage-of-completion accounting for long-term contracts. MRP run automation can create unintended purchase orders; validate MRP parameters before automated production planning.

auth.notes: Infor SyteLine uses OAuth 2.0 (Infor OS/ION authentication). REST APIs via Infor ION API gateway. New York, New York (Infor HQ). Koch Industries subsidiary (acquired 2012). SyteLine is Infor's discrete manufacturing ERP; called CloudSuite Industrial in the cloud. 2,000+ manufacturing customers. Strong in job shop, ETO, and mid-market manufacturing. Competes with Epicor, SYSPRO, and QAD for discrete manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module, user count, and deployment
pricing.notes: New York, New York. Infor is Koch Industries subsidiary. SyteLine founded 1981 (System Software Associates). Infor acquired 2012. CloudSuite Industrial is cloud SyteLine. 2,000+ manufacturers. Strong in job shop, ETO, and metal fabrication. ION integration platform for enterprise connectivity. Competes with Epicor ERP, SYSPRO, and QAD for mid-market manufacturing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; Infor OS plan dependent

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Regulated manufacturing (aerospace AS9100, medical ISO 13485) requires validated ERP configuration changes; automated ERP parameter changes without quality system validation violates regulatory requirements
Infor ION API gateway requirement — SyteLine REST APIs flow through Infor ION API gateway; ION configuration and connection points must be set up before REST API integration
MRP automated purchase orders — MRP run automation creates purchase requisitions and potentially POs; validate MRP demand and supply parameters before automated planning runs
ETO project cost overrun — engineer-to-order projects have contract-specific pricing; automated job cost tracking must monitor cost overrun vs. contract price
Koch Industries ownership — Koch Industries ownership of Infor creates unique strategic dynamics; verify product roadmap independence and development investment
On-premise SyteLine base — SyteLine has large on-premise installed base; CloudSuite Industrial (cloud) and on-premise versions have different API access patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/Infor ION. US/EU. Manufacturing production and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/ION. US/EU. Manufacturing and production data.
